canonical_name: the closest of kinsmen to me
one who was of Uther Pendragon's blood
the folk about the castle and countryside
the people of the court and of the country roundabout
any of her ladies who had never been so tempted
her ladies who had never been so tempted
masterless men who throng the country
an inner room, and the serving-woman
the jolly young woman who had fostered her son Balan
the clumsy little boy he had been more than twenty years ago
those pretty babies who played about our feet
